docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2008 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-25-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-25-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMMS, ADAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLEN, CHARLES JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVEN A BASIS FOR LIABILITY BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SIMMS, ADAM AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, CHARLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
